arts.ttl: Man Utd mocked as Amad wears tracksuit with upside down badge amid club's struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a nightmare season and hit another low point this week as Amad was handed a training jacket with the club's badge printed upside-down

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Rangers: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Tables | Read Football Daily | Email Scott The battles of Britain in European football – in pictures It’s the worst Manchester United team in history, some say. Ruben Amorim shouldn’t worry too much about that, however, because it’s not as though the current Rangers team is of classic vintage either. Both sides are in decent form in the Europa League, mind. It’s eighth versus ninth, with United unbeaten and Rangers coming off the back of a 4-1 win in Nice and an Ibrox draw with Tottenham Hotspur. Kick-off is at 8pm GMT. In the meantime, Amorim will be giving his players the usual pre-match pep-talk, issuing beneficial advice with the help of visual aids such as chalkboard, tactics table, and … oh yes, he’ll need one of those as well, won’t he. We recommend these guys. Great service, great sets, and their parent company has great brand recognition in the Manchester area. Continue reading...
